**Michelangelo Vito "Mike" Massenzio** (born November 1, 1982) is an American [mixed martial artist](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") who competed as a [Middleweight](/wiki/Middleweight_(MMA) "Middleweight (MMA)") in the [Ultimate Fighting Championship](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship").

## Background

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Background")]

He wrestled in New Jersey and was a two-time high school state champion in 2000 (160 lbs.) and 2001 (171 lbs.) at [St. Joseph Regional High School](/wiki/St._Joseph_Regional_High_School "St. Joseph Regional High School") in [Montvale, New Jersey](/wiki/Montvale,_New_Jersey "Montvale, New Jersey"). Additionally in 2001, Mike was the U.S. National High School Wrestling Champion. In 2003, he was the Runner-up at the Junior College National Tournament and was crowned the National Champion in 2004.

## Mixed martial arts career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Mixed martial arts career")]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [[icon]](/wiki/File:Wiki_letter_w_cropped.svg) | **This section is empty.** You can help by [adding to it](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=). *(March 2026)* |

## Early career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Early career")]

In Jujitsu and Submission Grappling, Mike has won numerous competitions in both N.A.G.A. and Grappler's Quest. In 2006 he was crowned the N.A.G.A. World Champion in the Expert Division of the Submission fighting competition.

[[2]](#cite_note-2)
Mike is currently head coach for The Ridgewood Junior Wrestling Program in Ridgewood, New Jersey.

### Ultimate Fighting Championship

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Ultimate Fighting Championship")]

Mike's first win for the promotion came over [Drew McFedries](/wiki/Drew_McFedries "Drew McFedries") via submission at [UFC Fight Night: Diaz vs Neer](/wiki/UFC_Fight_Night:_Diaz_vs_Neer "UFC Fight Night: Diaz vs Neer") in his UFC debut. However, Massenzio lost in his next bout to [CB Dollaway](/wiki/CB_Dollaway "CB Dollaway") on December 27, 2008, at [UFC 92](/wiki/UFC_92 "UFC 92").

Massenzio then missed several months, before facing former [WEC Light Heavyweight Champion](/wiki/List_of_WEC_champions#Light_Heavyweight_Championship "List of WEC champions") [Brian Stann](/wiki/Brian_Stann "Brian Stann"), who was making his middleweight debut, on August 1, 2010, at [UFC on Versus 2](/wiki/UFC_on_Versus_2 "UFC on Versus 2").[[3]](#cite_note-3) Massenzio was submitted by a triangle choke midway through the final round. After second straight loss in the UFC he was released from the promotion.

### Return to UFC

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Return to UFC")]

Massenzio next returned to the UFC replacing an injured [Igor Pokrajac](/wiki/Igor_Pokrajac "Igor Pokrajac") against [Krzysztof Soszynski](/wiki/Krzysztof_Soszynski "Krzysztof Soszynski") on June 11, 2011, at [UFC 131](/wiki/UFC_131 "UFC 131").[[4]](#cite_note-4) Massenzio took the fight at light heavyweight with only 3 days notice, despite normally fighting at middleweight. He lost the fight via unanimous decision (30–27, 30–26, 30–27).

Massenzio fought [Steve Cantwell](/wiki/Steve_Cantwell "Steve Cantwell") on October 8, 2011, at [UFC 136](/wiki/UFC_136 "UFC 136"). He won the fight via unanimous decision.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

Massenzio faced [Rousimar Palhares](/wiki/Rousimar_Palhares "Rousimar Palhares") on January 14, 2012, at [UFC 142](/wiki/UFC_142 "UFC 142")[[6]](#cite_note-6) He lost the fight via submission when Palhares put him in a heel hook in the first round.

Massenzio faced [Karlos Vemola](/wiki/Karlos_Vemola "Karlos Vemola") on May 5, 2012, at [UFC on Fox 3](/wiki/UFC_on_Fox_3 "UFC on Fox 3").[[7]](#cite_note-7) He lost the bout in the second round due to a rear-naked choke and was subsequently released from the promotion once again.[[8]](#cite_note-8)

## Championships and accomplishments

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mike_Massenzio&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Championships and accomplishments")]

* **[Ultimate Fighting Championship](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship")**
  + [Fight of the Night](/wiki/List_of_UFC_bonus_award_recipients "List of UFC bonus award recipients") (One time) vs. [Brian Stann](/wiki/Brian_Stann "Brian Stann")
